citations.narrative:
The licensee moved to a new location and failed to notify APHIS Animal Care of the change in address. Upon arriving at
the facility, the inspector spoke to the new resident who stated that the licensee had moved several months prior to the
inspection. The inspector later spoke to the licensee over the phone and he confirmed that he had moved and is planning
to conduct regulated activities soon.
Failure to notify Animal Care of a change in location can make it difficult to verify regulated activities and ensure the
health and wellbeing of regulated animals.
A licensee shall notify Animal Care no fewer than 90 days before any change in the name, address, management,
substantial control or ownership of his business or operation, locations, activities, and number or type of animals.
Correct by: June 17. 2026.

citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:30pm on
5/27/2026. The inspector spoke to the current resident who stated that the licensee had moved several months prior to
the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.1(b)(1) 
   
Requirements and application 
The licensee moved to a new location and failed to notify APHIS Animal Care of the change in address. Upon arriving at 
the facility, the inspector spoke to the new resident who stated that the licensee had moved several months prior to the 
inspection. The inspector later spoke to the licensee over the phone and he confirmed that he had moved and is planning 
to conduct regulated activities soon.  
Failure to notify Animal Care of a change in location can make it difficult to verify regulated activities and ensure the 
health and wellbeing of regulated animals. 
A licensee shall notify Animal Care no fewer than 90 days before any change in the name, address, management, 
substantial control or ownership of his business or operation, locations, activities, and number or type of animals. 
Correct by: June 17. 2026. 
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:30pm on 
5/27/2026. The inspector spoke to the current resident who stated that the licensee had moved several months prior to 
the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
